calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-21-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee, S. Ravinantapricha,
CSR: K. HELD, #2857

PAUL HOGARTH, Esq. for Plaintiff: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC..
Plaintiff's Witness JAVIER PUENTES was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant LATONYA DAVIS.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 2791 16TH STREET, RM #64, SF, CA 94103
The lease is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-21-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-17-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514 Judge: Linda Colfax; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.
Appearances:

Paul Hogarth, Esq. for Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.
F. Sharee Hess, Esq., representing the Defendant Latonya Davis through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem: David Yang, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 503-B for settlement discussions.

Case did not settle, trial date confirmed.
